title: Important Update Regarding Sales Tax Reporting
summary: We would like to inform you of an important update regarding sales tax reporting. Effective immediately, sales tax reports are due on a quarterly basis in alignment with City Code, rather than annually as previously practiced by some businesses. To ensure compliance with regulations, please be aware...

title: SNC 2025 Summer Internship Program
summary: SNC is accepting applications for the 2025 Summer Internship program. Internship positions are full-time (40 hours per week) and run from May 27 to August 8. Internships provide students with on-the-job training and work experience as well as an opportunity for career exploration, professional devel...

title: Congratulations to Chugach’s 2024 Pek’stangiyaq Award Winners!
summary: What truly sets these awardee stars apart? It’s how they’ve embraced and embodied Chugach’s Core Behaviors: We do things the right way We create meaningful value We empower people We build community We leave things better than we found them In Sugpiaq, the language of the Chugach region, Pek’stangiyaq means “Good Worker.” Traditionally, good workers were the backbone of a thriving village, ensuring its prosperity....

title: U.S. Army Corps of Engineers Approves Section 404 Permits for Exploration
summary: NANA Regional Corporation (NANA) is pleased to announce that the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers has approved the Section 404 permit, which is essential for constructing an access road to the Aktigiruq and Anarraaq deposits. These deposits, located on state of Alaska lands, represent a significant step...
